import json, os, textwrap, re, unicodedata, math, statistics, difflib

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)

type(quran_data), type(hadith_data), len(quran_data) if isinstance(quran_data, list) else None, len(hadith_data) if isinstance(hadith_data, list) else None

# Inspect a few entries
quran_data[0], hadith_data[0].keys()

import re
import unicodedata

AR_DIACRITICS = ''.join([
    '\u0610', '\u0611', '\u0612', '\u0613', '\u0614',
    '\u0615', '\u0616', '\u0617', '\u0618', '\u0619',
    '\u061A', '\u064B', '\u064C', '\u064D', '\u064E',
    '\u064F', '\u0650', '\u0651', '\u0652', '\u0653',
    '\u0654', '\u0655', '\u0656', '\u0657', '\u0658',
    '\u0670', # dagger alif
    '\u06D6', '\u06D7', '\u06D8', '\u06D9', '\u06DA',
    '\u06DB', '\u06DC', '\u06DF', '\u06E0', '\u06E1',
    '\u06E2', '\u06E3', '\u06E4', '\u06E7', '\u06E8',
    '\u06EA', '\u06EB', '\u06EC', '\u06ED'
])
AR_DIACRITICS_RE = re.compile('[%s]' % re.escape(AR_DIACRITICS))

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    # remove diacritics
    text = AR_DIACRITICS_RE.sub('', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('ـ', '')
    # unify hamza forms
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    text = text.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ى','ي')
    # normalize taa marbuta to ha? Typically leave as ta marbuta; keep 'ة' to 'ه'? We'll leave as 'ه' to unify
    # But that may distort. We'll leave 'ة' unchanged; it's distinct.
    # remove punctuation and quotes
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)
    # remove underscores/latin numbers etc keep arabic letters and numbers and spaces
    # collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lowercase (not applicable to Arabic but for Latin filler)
    return text

def similarity(a, b):
    na, nb = normalize_arabic(a), normalize_arabic(b)
    # Use token-based F1 and SequenceMatcher ratio and LCS ratio
    # token-based overlap
    ta, tb = na.split(), nb.split()
    inter = len(set(ta) & set(tb))
    if len(set(ta)) + len(set(tb)) == 0:
        token_f1 = 0.0
    else:
        precision = inter / len(set(tb)) if set(tb) else 0
        recall = inter / len(set(ta)) if set(ta) else 0
        token_f1 = 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0.0
    seq_ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, na, nb).ratio()
    # Weighted average
    return 0.5*token_f1 + 0.5*seq_ratio

original_span = "لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ"
normalize_arabic(original_span), similarity(original_span, original_span)

target = original_span
best = []
for i, h in enumerate(hadith_data):
    for field in ['hadithTxt', 'Matn']:
        txt = h.get(field) or ""
        if not txt:
            continue
        sim = similarity(target, txt)
        if sim > 0.6:  # keep moderately high; we'll sort later
            best.append((sim, field, i, txt))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: -x[0])
len(best_sorted), best_sorted[:10]

# get the text at index 14
text_candidate = hadith_data[14]['Matn']
text_candidate, repr(text_candidate), len(text_candidate)
